title.en: It's just that most of the dimensions are nothing.

content.en:
The Tricky Wood Red Dragon poured all his power into the hands of the quasi-innate multi-dimensional treasure in his hand.

In an instant, countless rays of light appeared, freezing the void of death in front of him.

Immediately afterwards, the multi-dimensional space in front of them was broken down little by little, and layers of dimensions were manifested, and then expanded, allowing them to clearly perceive the layers of dimensions in front of them.

It's just that most of the dimensions are nothing.

Suddenly.

A certain dimension transmits an endless golden light, containing terrifying power.

"Found it!"

Both Tricky Wood Red Dragon and Ye Tian were very excited.

"Get in!"

Swish!

Ye Tian and the Tricky Wood Red Dragon entered this dimension, and after they entered, the outside world returned to calm.

......

After entering this dimension, Ye Tian and Yumu Chilong were very nervous.

According to the information of the Tricky Wood Red Dragon, this is just the inheritance place left by the sixth realm, and the grade is not high, and this inheritance will give different tests to the coming extradimensional realm.

They are the third realm of cultivation, and the test should also be at this level.

Soon.

They came to the Land of Inheritance, but there are tens of thousands of extradimensional passages here, each of which is different, and I am afraid that it connects different places.

Moreover, when they came here, they had the feeling that different passages represented different 820 tests, and they could only enter one passage.

"Do you want to pick a random passage?"

Ye Tian asked the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon also frowned, not knowing how to choose.

"You can't rush in, that Sixth Realm is not a benevolent person, his test is also dangerous, maybe some passages represent a dead end, once you enter, you will definitely die!"

Anyway, they have enough time, and there is no need to rush in.

Immediately, they began to study the passages, trying to find some clues.

"These extra-dimensional channels are all condensed by extra-dimensional rules, and they all seem to be similar, but each extra-dimensional channel is actually different. "

Ye Tian analyzed these extra-dimensional channels from the perspective of extradimensional rules, and the replica body of the outside world used the Yutian Lotus Platform to continuously analyze these extra-dimensional channels.

Gradually, he really came up with something.

In his analysis, these extra-dimensional channels turned into super-dimensional diagrams.

Some extradimensional diagrams are very incomplete, as if they contain murderous intentions, but some extradimensional diagrams are very perfect.

"I understand, these incomplete Extradimensional (CBFA) diagrams are actually not real extradimensional passages at all, once entered, they are the place of mortality, and they cannot enter the real inheritance land at all. "

Ye Tian ignored these incomplete extradimensional diagrams, and focused his gaze on the sixteen perfect extradimensional diagrams.

In other words, there are only these sixteen true extradimensional channels.

But.

Sixteen extradimensional passages, only one of them can be entered.

Which extradimensional channel should I enter?

Subsequently, he began to study the sixteen extradimensional diagrams, hoping to discern something from them.

He silently consulted and studied to see which extradimensional map was suitable for him, and he could only choose this way.

After some time.

Ye Tian seemed to feel that a certain extra-dimensional map was extremely suitable for him, and he was vaguely attracted to him.

"Just choose it!"

Ye Tian opened his eyes and stared at a super-dimensional channel on the very edge, that is, the super-dimensional channel that attracted him.

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, let's enter this extradimensional passage!"

Ye Tian pointed to the extradimensional passage and suggested.

"Ye Tian, why did you choose that extradimensional channel?" Tricky Wood Red Dragon didn't immediately agree, after all, such a cautious matter can't be easily decided!

Ye Tian explained: "There are so many extra-dimensional channels here, in fact, most of them are dead ends, and there should only be sixteen extra-dimensional channels that are really safe. "

"Of the sixteen extradimensional passages, this one should be the best for me. "

Ye Tiandao.

It is most suitable for Ye Tian, but it is not necessarily suitable for the Tricky Wood Red Dragon.

But Tricky Wood Chilong did not hesitate at all, he still believed in Ye Tian and was willing to follow Ye Tian in.

After all, Ye Tian's current strength far surpassed him, and if he didn't follow Ye Tian, he wouldn't be sure that he would survive to obtain the true liquid of Wumu.

"Ye Tian, then enter this extra-dimensional channel!"

The red dragon of the tree replied.

Wow!!

They entered the extradimensional passage, and along the long extradimensional passage, they came to the true inheritance land deep in this dimension.

......

In a few moments, they arrived at the true land of inheritance, and entered through the extradimensional passage.

At this time, the Tricky Wood Red Dragon looked back and saw sixteen huge passages running through this void, each passage going to a different location, but it could be seen from here that only sixteen passages had really arrived at the Land of Inheritance.

"There are really only sixteen safe passages, so it seems that once the other passages enter, they will definitely die!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon trembled.

How difficult it is to choose a safe channel from tens of thousands of extradimensional channels, not to mention that it is even more incredible to accurately find all the safe paths.

He was very puzzled, how did Ye Tian do it, he couldn't see it at all.

But when he thought of Ye Tian's progress speed, he didn't feel strange.

At this time.

Ye Tian and Weimu Chilong's eyes were both staring at a gray picture scroll in front of them, and this gray picture scroll was across the void in front of them.

Then.

A voice came.

"Comprehend the true picture of Wumu and comprehend the first layer, you can choose a reward. "

A voice came from the darkness.

"Wumu Zhentu!!!" The Tricky Wood Red Dragon exclaimed.

"Tricky Wood Red Dragon, do you know the true picture of Wumu, what is this?" Ye Tian asked.

Tricky Wood Red Dragon said: "The Wumu True Diagram is the most important inheritance of the Wumu Realm Lord, and it is also one of the top innate multi-dimensional Dao bodies, the key is that this top innate multi-dimensional Dao body can cultivate the first layer without any auxiliary materials!"

"However, if you want to cultivate to the first level of Xiaocheng or Dacheng realm, it is more difficult, and there are a total of five layers of Wumu Body, which is the top innate multi-dimensional Dao body! At the same time, Wumu True Diagram is also an innate multi-dimensional treasure. In other words, the true picture of Wumu in front of him is a complete innate multi-dimensional treasure. "

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon stared at the true picture of the black mother in front of him with burning eyes, eager to snatch it immediately.

Swish!

He reached out and grabbed the true picture of Wumu, but he didn't catch anything.

"Sure enough, we can't snatch away the true picture of Wumu, and the little means left by the sixth realm are not something that we can see through in the third realm!"

The Tricky Wood Red Dragon completely gave up the idea of snatching the true picture of the black mother.
